---
title: Possibility Exceeds Imagination
author: ~
date: '2026-03-25'
slug: possibility-exceeds-imagination
categories: []
tags: []
---

> The space of things you can do is much greater than the space of things you can conceive of doing. --- François Chollet

花了两个小时的时间，在 codex 的协助下，打通了 heptabase -> blog 的写作流程。从现在开始，我在 heptabase 的笔记，就可以很快地转化成博客文章了。**Build in Public！**
